scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    TRIM(CAST(almacen_id AS NVARCHAR))   AS almacen_id,
    TRIM(nombre)                         AS nombre,
    TRIM(municipio)                      AS municipio,
    TRIM(departamento)                   AS departamento,
    TRIM(direccion)                      AS direccion,
    TRIM(CAST(capacidad_m3 AS NVARCHAR)) AS capacidad_m3,
    TRIM(estado)                         AS estado
FROM bronze.agenciasedem_almacenes',
nombre = iif(isNull(nombre) || trim(replace(nombre, '"', '')) == '', 'Sin Nombre Almacen', initCap(trim(replace(replace(nombre, 'AlmacÃ©n', 'Almacen'), '"', '')))),
municipio = iif(isNull(municipio) || trim(replace(municipio, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(municipio, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), initCap(trim(replace(municipio, '"', '')))),

departamento = iif(isNull(departamento) || trim(replace(departamento, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(departamento, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), initCap(trim(replace(departamento, '"', '')))),
direccion = iif(isNull(direccion) || trim(replace(direccion, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(direccion, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), initCap(trim(replace(direccion, '"', '')))),
estado = iif(isNull(estado) || trim(replace(estado, '"', '')) == '', toString(null()), upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))))) ~> derivedColumn1
